sections.content: Accountability means taking responsibilities and doing tasks by going beyond. It also means exhibiting something the same way, even when not being watched. For businesses, accountability is an attitude that determines how employees takes ownership and achieves desired results. For an individual it means to take full responsibility of any task…to – see it, own it, solve it and do it. Skillsbucket offers Accountability and Ownership as one day experiential program. It helps transform the attitude and behaviour of the participants by self assessments and upskill them with techniques to conduct any task with accountability and ownership.

content: Learn how accountability and ownership can lead to success
Understand responsiveness and how to display it
Identify the task and how you can go beyond
How to integrate see it, own it, solve it and do it in any task
Build credibility and trust-Leading by example
